title: Native Prompt File
description: File attached to a Duck.ai prompt. Shape mirrors Duck.ai's `NativePromptFile` input so native forwards entries unchanged.

data.description: Base64-encoded file bytes, without the `data:` URL prefix.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the file. An open string (not an enum) to match Duck.ai's input shape. v1 only sends `application/pdf`.
